elements.original_description: A gray, droopy-faced cartoon character sitting on a plain gray chair in the center of the frame, surrounded by blank white space. No text, no letters, no numbers, no watermarks.
elements.image_prompt: A high-quality 2D minimalist cartoon illustration featuring a gray, droopy-faced character sitting on a plain gray chair, centered in the frame. The character expresses melancholy and boredom. The art style is clean flat vector art with high contrast, no shading or gradients, on a pure white background. The scene is intentionally sparse and empty, conveying a feeling of dullness and monotony.
